title: fumaria agraria subsp. atlantica
intro: Fumaria agraria subsp. atlantica is a subspecies of the Fumaria agraria plant, also known as a type of fumitory, which is a low-growing, annual or biennial herb native to the Atlantic coast of Europe and North Africa. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving digestive problems, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Fumaria agraria subsp. atlantica is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to leverage its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
